name: Texture Map POP
description: The Texture Map POP creates the Tex attribute which is used to apply texture maps to surfaces, or to position procedurally-generated textures to surfaces. The Tex attribute is a float3 3-component attribute. It can appear as a point attribute or a vertex attribute. It is created by all the generator POPs like the [[Plane POP]], [[Grid POP]], [[Sphere POP]], [[Rectangle POP]], [[Box POP]] etc., but Tex can also created with the Texture Map POP. There are various projection methods, each useful depending on the type of geometry it is being applied to and its use-case. Equirectangular Inside and Outside is a spherical polar longitude/latitude mapping used on vertices, used in VR, either to be viewed from the inside of a sphere or outside. Domes require the mapping type Equidistant Azimuth, a fish eye projection. Projection mapping uses perspective from camera simulating what is "seen" from the position of a projector. Triplanar Coordinates is a type that generates 3 sets of texture coordinates (3 attributes) used to map 1 texture onto an object but is a blend of 3 orthographic projections onto 3 sides of an object. There is nothing special about the Tex attribute - any attribute can be used by a Material. The [[Normalize POP]] and the [[Projection POP]] produce attributes that can be used with a material, like doing orhtographic scaled projections, or spherical/cylindrical projections. Some materials require multiple texture coordinates, which can be created with any of these methods in creating Tex2, Tex3, etc. and provided to the materials. Note: In SOPs this was similar to the use of the uvw attribute for texture coordinates. See also [[PBR MAT]], [[Phong MAT]], [[Normalize POP]] and the [[Projection POP]]

parameters.name: Primitive Group
parameters.label: Primitive Group
parameters.description: Optional primitive group to select.

parameters.name: Transform Input Texture Coord
parameters.label: Transform Input Texture Coord
parameters.description: Enable transforms on the input texture coordinates.

parameters.name: Input Texture Coord Attribute
parameters.label: Input Texture Coord Attribute
parameters.description: Input Texture coordinate attribute to transform.

parameters.name: Position Attribute
parameters.label: Position Attribute
parameters.description: Projected position attribute.

parameters.name: Projection Axis
parameters.label: Projection Axis
parameters.description: Transform axis used for the projection

parameters.name: FOV Angle
parameters.label: FOV Angle
parameters.description: Determines the camera's field of view angle.

parameters.name: Center Mode
parameters.label: Center Mode
parameters.description: For fisheye projection, whether the projection will use the bounding box center or a manually specified center.

parameters.name: Center
parameters.label: Center
parameters.description: For fisheye projection, when center is manual, the position of the center to use for the projection.

parameters.name: Camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Specify the camera component.

parameters.name: Camera Aspect
parameters.label: Camera Aspect
parameters.description: The aspect ratio for the projection.

parameters.name: Apply to
parameters.label: Apply to
parameters.description: Where to apply the texture coordinates.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: UV transform scaling factor.

parameters.name: Offset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Adds an offset to the resulting texture mapping.

parameters.name: Rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotates the texture coordinate the specified value.

parameters.name: Fix Face Seams
parameters.label: Fix Face Seams
parameters.description: Enable attempting to correct texture continuity at face seams.

parameters.name: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the POP input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: Attribute Type
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: Components
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: Default Value
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: Default values of the output attribute components if they cannot be computed.

parameters.name: Texture Method
parameters.label: Texture Method
parameters.description: Determines how the texture coordinates are applied.

parameters.name: Transform Order
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: Sets the overall transform order for the transformations.

parameters.name: Rotate Order
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of the rotations within the overall transform order.

parameters.name: Translate
parameters.label: Translate
parameters.description: Translate the texture coordinates in the three axes.

parameters.name: Rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotate the points around the corresponding X, Y and Z axes. Angles are given in degrees.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: UV transform scaling factor.

parameters.name: Pivot
parameters.label: Pivot
parameters.description: The pivot point for the transform rotates and scales.
